issues.title: Remove CLA link from PR Template
issues.body:
I saw that [CLA is not using now](https://spring.io/blog/2025/01/06/hello-dco-goodbye-cla-simplifying-contributions-to-spring), but [CLA Link(even broken)](https://cla.pivotal.io/sign/spring) is being displayed by Pull Request Template like below:

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/9ca50ddc-f85c-435a-9f59-5a43abb86973)
